---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What is the user pain or use case that the current framework does not handle well?

## Proposed solution

Describe how you'd like it to work. A short pseudo-code snippet or
config example helps a lot.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about, and why this is better.

## Additional context

Related issues, prior art (LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen patterns), screenshots.
